briefdescription.para: This function prepares a device to transfers as a master.

parameterdescription.para: Specifies whether the device is sending or receiving.

simplesect.para: Interrupts are always disabled. The device which needs to use interrupts must setup interrupts after this call.

briefdescription.para: This function handles continuation of sending data.

detaileddescription.para: It is invoked from interrupt handler.

briefdescription.para: Handles polled mode receive in master mode.
Handles interrupt-driven send in master mode.
Handles interrupt-driven receive in master mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the interrupt status register.

briefdescription.para: Handles the continuation of receiving data.

detaileddescription.para: It is invoked from interrupt handler.

simplesect.para: Number of bytes still expected by the instance.
